title: Auto-create Open VSX namespace before publish

source.subject: ci: auto-create Open VSX namespace before publish

body:
Auto-creates the **Open VSX namespace** before first publish attempts.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ba0732c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ba0732c)
- **Subject:** ci: auto-create Open VSX namespace before publish
- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
Reduces manual registry setup for **v01-open-vsx**.
